query:
-- المطاعم اليدوية المفعّلة
SELECT 'manual' as type, id, name, isAcceptingOrders, isOpen, streetId, cityId 
FROM restaurants 
WHERE isAcceptingOrders = 1
UNION ALL
-- مطاعم Google Place المفعّلة
SELECT 'google' as type, id, name, isActive as isAcceptingOrders, 1 as isOpen, streetId, cityId
FROM googlePlaceRestaurants
WHERE isActive = 1;
